response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Mori Calliope as the performer. 2. Divided video into 4 scenes: Intro talk, 'Gold Unbalance' snippet, talk, 'MOMENTO' snippet. 3. Used web search to find full lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance' and 'MOMENTO'. 4. Formatted lyrics and added metadata for each song scene.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Mori Calliope talking about her new songs and performing short, acapella segments of 'Gold Unbalance' and 'MOMENTO'.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope is talking and introducing her new songs.
Mori Calliope sings a short segment of her song 'Gold Unbalance'. Text 'Music: Gold Unbalance' appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In this story full of variables
I fight to win proof of my identity
Trying every trick in the book
Transforming, changing means
Passion that stabs my heart, stopping it
Emotion is not fiction
Joy, anger, sorrow, pleasure
One body, one soul
All the impulses
Taste both failure and success
We are the golden buddy
In this world that seems meaningless
Light born from countless coincidences
Throbbing heartbeat
We can't become anyone else
Then let's weave our own words
Don't look down on us
A little bit of courage is enough
Strongly, proudly, climb to the top
Overwhelming, climax
If we're together, we can do it
Back-to-back, no matter what
Everything we carry will turn into a weapon
Different levels, let our shout reach far
No one can stop our route
Distinguish between 1st, 2nd, 3rd
From the start, you're a loser
Greedily, to the point of annoyance
Steal that heart from the abyss of hell
This is not a loop of reincarnation
Our route extends endlessly
We don't walk the ordinary, easy path
We are experts who love the thorny path
Just laugh grandly
Gradation of talent and worldly desires
Either way, let's just make it a mess
Once you've started, have the determination to see it through
The duet of loser and winner
Inferiority complex, unwanted absurd waste
Shake it all off greedily
Our ambition will never fade
If we're together, we can do it
What is living?
Is it the lazy ones who win?
That's just a fallacy
Just crush it
Don't just be surface-level
Entertain-rider
Betting life, running at full speed
Whether it's despair or glory
Lemme see you fight back
Saying that nothing will change anyway
Imprisoned in this meme-ified reality
This life where we're stuck taking chances
Are you tired of it already?
We're living in a world with no direction
Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection
Tearing the walls apart
Facing it all, side by side
Once again, it's us against the world
Don't look down on us
Let your instincts heat up
Show me the real deal
Overwhelming, climax
Dance in this unbalanced world

scenes.description: Mori Calliope sings a short segment of her song 'MOMENTO'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
so just how far could i go
i think i already know
that view that i wanna see
a place in history that’s mine
i don’t know why we’re
always side by side, but worlds apart
it’s trial by fire
i’m fighting for a place where we can breath
when spite takes over
i might just take it out on you
‘cause you’re
too good to be true
struggling but carrying on
i’ll go where nobody has gone
i’m searching again and again and again
for something only i can do, asking why
i can’t be someone else
despite it all my mind has become my hell with no escape
or hope in the dark but still in my heart
your words echo over and over
i’m finally letting go, but i can’t erase you
i’m following behind, but i won’t chase you
i’m swallowing my pride until the time
that i can face you
i thought that it was love in the perfect lighting
it’s never been enough, but i’ll keep on writing
a story that’s evolving
from the day that i decided i’m alone
i don’t belong anywhere anymore
it was my decision
i’m gonna break down the door to your heart
without your permission
there was nothing that could make me stay
remember it like it was yesterday
hanging onto every word you’d say
what if i’d walked away?
how can i still carry on
someday when you’re finally gone?
i’m searching again and again and again
for something only i can do, the truth is
i can’t be someone else
despite it all my mind has become my hell with no escape
or hope in the dark but still in my heart
my words echo over and over
i’m finally letting go, and you can’t erase me
‘cause i’m the only one that could ever replace me
igniting every line until the time
that i can face me
i thought that it was love in the perfect lighting
it’s never been enough, but i’ll keep on writing
the story that evolved me
it’s today that i’m deciding, i’m alright
so just how far could i go?
i think i already know
the view that i wanna see
i still could make it in time
